latex:
You keep track of your test scores one semester. Your results are:

$93, 87, 92, 88, 90$

Part A Find and interpret the number of data values.

There are \underline{\hspace{1cm}} data values. So, you had \underline{\hspace{1cm}} tests in one semester.

Part B What are the units?

a. $\bigcirc$ inches

b. $\bigcirc$ Richter magnitudes

c. $\bigcirc$ percents

d. $\bigcirc$ liters
answer_latex: Part A: 5; 5 \quad Part B: c. percents
